name: Zucchini Southern Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the zucchini well under cold tap water. Cut off the ends. Slice into 1-inch thick pieces. Set aside.
2. Cut the bacon into 1-inch pieces. Place in a 2-quart saucepan.
3. Peel and chop the onion. Add to the saucepan with the bacon.
4. Add the zucchini slices to the pan.
5. Cover the pan and place on medium heat. Cook for 15-20 minutes, stirring around 2-3 times during cooking.
6. Add salt and pepper to taste. Serve.
